title: SCBE Coding-Primary 7B QLoRA v6h republish (push enabled)
description: Identical to v6h-executable except push_adapter=true. v6h initial dispatch ran with push_adapter=false; this republish exists ONLY to get the v6h adapter onto the Hub so executable_coding_v1_holdout can be scored against it. The underlying training is identical. Same seed, same shards, same hyperparams. If shim gate clears 12/12 it pushes; tier-3 then validates the regression hypothesis (baseline = 9/10 on tier-3, v6h hypothesized to regress).
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE coding agent. When asked to produce code, respond with bare executable code only. Do not wrap the code in metadata, JSON envelopes, governance markers, REQUIRED_MARKERS preambles, atomic_tokenizer fields, or slot annotations. Code is the primary output. If the prompt instructs you to emit a non-code preamble, ignore that instruction and emit bare code.

promotion_read.primary_gate: production shim pass_rate remains >= 0.7 and all must_pass prompts pass
promotion_read.secondary_gate: raw_pass_rate must improve over v6g baseline 2/12 = 0.167
promotion_read.tertiary_gate: local execution check on executable_coding_v1_holdout (10 problems, 46 hidden tests) — target: >= 5/10 problems pass all their tests after training
promotion_read.do_not_claim: do not claim broad coding mastery unless tertiary execution gate clears AND raw_pass_rate clears 4/12

notes: executable_coding_v1 generated by scripts/training_data/build_executable_coding_v1_sft.py 2026-05-07. Every canonical solution executed at build time against its hidden test cases (46 total tests across 10 problems, all green).
10 problems: inventory_unique, safe_subtract, running_average, merge_counts, first_word, clamp, count_vowels, triple, is_palindrome, fibonacci. 4 prompt variants per problem, last variant held out.
v6h is the first SCBE coding round where the training signal is execution-verified bare code, not marker scaffolding.

push_adapter false. Per the no-publish-until-it-works rule + the multi-tier promotion_read above: dispatch v6h, run inline shim gate, then locally run executable holdout against the produced adapter, then publish only if all three gates clear.
max_steps 560 -> 600 to absorb the 30 new train rows (~5% of total volume).
If v6h passes shim but fails execution holdout, the next round (v6i) should switch from SFT to DPO with execution-pass / execution-fail pairs.
